description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a dark brown finish and a classic, slightly distressed appearance. The upper section features four open shelves, ideal for displaying books, decorative items, or storage baskets. The lower section consists of a two-door cabinet with recessed paneling, providing enclosed storage space for less visually appealing items. The cabinet doors are equipped with small, round handles for easy access. The sides and back of the unit are solid, with the back panel being plain and unadorned. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for placement in urban environments such as offices, libraries, community centers, or residential entryways.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden shelving unit with four open shelves above a two-door cabinet, featuring a classic, slightly distressed finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the unit and the paneling detail on the cabinet and shelving sections.
description_view_1: Front view displaying four open shelves and a two-door cabinet with visible handles, highlighting the main storage and display features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the paneling and depth seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, solid back panel with no openings or decorative features.
